title: Reports
lede: Compare how your calling campaigns perform side by side: live progress and connect rates in Campaign Stats, and per-campaign calls, outcomes, and cost in Campaign Reports.

steps.title: Open Campaign Reports
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, under Campaigns, open Campaign Reports.
  2. Each row is one campaign, so you can compare campaigns against each other in a single table.

images.caption: Campaign Reports lists calls, outcomes, and cost per campaign
Campaign Reports lists calls, outcomes, and cost per campaign

steps.title: Understand the report columns
steps.content:
For each campaign the report shows:

  • Status — whether the campaign is running, paused, or finished.
  • Calls/Events — how many calls were placed.
  • Minutes/Units — total talk time consumed.
  • Sell Rate and Bill Amount — the per-minute rate billed and the total billed.

Main accounts also see Cost Rate, Total Cost, and Profit to compare what a campaign cost against what it was billed.

steps.title: Filter and export
steps.content:
1. Use the date range at the top to set the reporting window (it defaults to the last 30 days for speed).
  2. Filter by a specific campaign or account to narrow the list.
  3. Click Download to export the report as a CSV for your own spreadsheets or records.

steps.title: Open Campaign Stats for live monitoring
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, under Campaigns, open Campaign Stats.
  2. This is a live monitoring view: it shows your campaigns side by side with their current status, progress, connect rate, and cost as they run.

images.caption: Campaign Stats gives a live, side-by-side monitoring view across campaigns
Campaign Stats gives a live, side-by-side monitoring view across campaigns

steps.title: Act on what you see
steps.content:
• Low connect rate? Adjust your calling hours and time zone so you reach people when they're available.
  • Cost climbing faster than results? Pause the campaign and refine the dial list or the AI agent.
  • Want per-call detail? Open a campaign's Overview tab, or review individual calls in Call Center → Call Logs.
